This is a list of books read for the Sword and Laser Book Club. Click on book title for more information about the book club's involvement with that book. This list is in reverse chronological order from most recently read book (at top) to the first book read (at bottom of list). This list is sortable by Title, Author, or Publisher. Refresh the page to return to reverse chronological order.

See also Books Almost Chosen. Also a list of All Books that have made the Final 16 of March Madness
